entries.title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
entries.description: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.

entries.title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
entries.description: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.

entries.title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
entries.description: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

entries.title: Almost half of US singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
entries.description: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.

entries.title: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
entries.description: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.

entries.title: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
entries.description: FERC told grid operators to give data centers a fast lane for interconnections, but it failed to address electricity supply shortages.

entries.title: The smartphone era created an attention crisis — slow tech is fixing it
entries.description: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

entries.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
entries.description: Here's what you need to do to get those pesky "write with Gemini" pop-ups to go away.

entries.title: ‘Queer Eye’ life coach Karamo Brown launches Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone
entries.description: After spending a year and a half focusing on his own journey — from fitness and nutrition to meditation, sobriety, relationships, and personal growth — Brown wants to help others do the same.

entries.title: General Intuition in talks to raise $300M at around $2B valuation
entries.description: The startup trains embodied AI and world models using Medal’s dataset of 2 billion videos per year from 10 million monthly active users.

entries.title: A tech worker-backed PAC is bringing a $5M knife to Big Tech’s $100M gunfight
entries.description: Guardrails positions itself as a populist political movement that runs on small donations from people in the trenches of the AI boom.

entries.title: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences
entries.description: Forget stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions. Pixi is betting that the next evolution of messaging is interactive augmented reality (AR).

entries.title: Nobel laureate John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for rival Anthropic
entries.description: Jumper isn't the only big name leaving Google DeepMind.
